title: Fire's Survival Tweaks
description: Various enhancements intended for Survival mode, including silk spawners, cave-ins, slime enhancements, infested block blend, and more.
body:
This mod makes a few changes to enhance the gameplay. This mod can be run on a server without being installed on the client.

Here's what it does, all of these features can be individually turned off:



- Spawners can be mined with Silk Touch pickaxes
- Pick Block works on spawners (If the mod is installed on the client side too)
- Slimes absorb Slime Blocks and Honey to grow
- Slimes absorb Magma Blocks to turn into Magma Cubes
- Magma Cubes absorb Magma Blocks to grow
- Magma Cubes cool into Slimes when they come into contact with water
- Blaze Powder grows Nether Warts like Bonemeal grows most other plants
- Infested Blocks break at the same speed as their normal counterparts
- Cave-ins can happen when a lot of stone is destroyed at once

Forge:
Requires [Annotated DI](https://modrinth.com/mod/annotated-di) and [Fireplace Lib](https://modrinth.com/mod/fireplace-lib)

Fabric:
Requires [Fireplace Lib](https://modrinth.com/mod/fireplace-lib)

I strongly recommend using [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) if this is installed on the client because that's where the Config GUI is, but it is not required.

### Contact

To report issues or request new features, use the [issue tracker](https://github.com/The-Fireplace-Minecraft-Mods/Fires-Survival-Tweaks/issues). Do not ask me to port to different Minecraft versions. For questions and other discussion, feel free to join my [Discord](https://discord.gg/QXQYPj5).
